completion_summary: Implemented deterministic public spectral replicate-stability and between-state identifiability diagnostics plus a hash-bound vNext measure adapter. Validated by adapter intake 2/2 accepted, 743 passed/11 skipped full suite, 44 passed after merging current main, Ruff, mypy, claim audit, and 5000 deterministic audits (report sha256 83ade11fa5a1917e186b52246a643be5bc5a694ebbe17230732d4948eab68ed1; ~645 us/audit). Reference boundaries pinned to chemicals 82faef900dcf2b48537c31bcf1ab56c35bb79a1e and RMG-Py b858624649205fc8ae08aec601c4c216e9edcee0; neither provides instrument kernels. Limitations: diagnostic-only proposal; UV-vis default dilution is correctly reported insufficiently separated, and task-level identifiability matrices remain future work. Integrated implementation commit 36a7b8bc910e961f9f1df13edd6fdd4269c3f1dc.
scope: Deterministic spectral replicate-stability and state-identifiability audit with public non-leaking diagnostics and a vNext adapter proposal
